content.en:
"A god-winged blood ant with an innate primordial treasure, although it is difficult to entangle, but if it is surrounded and killed, there is also hope!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Fortunately, he met it, and if Soho and other elders met him, he might be dead.

After all, this god-winged blood ant is not only powerful, but also has insight into all loopholes, and there is no chance of escaping.

Bang!!!!!

Ye Tian fought with him, constantly delaying time, and the other replica bodies were already rushing over.

After a while, the other clone bodies finally rushed over, and immediately surrounded and killed the god-winged blood ant.

With six replica bodies to surround and kill, even if this god-winged blood ant has an innate primordial treasure, it can't parry, and it is impossible to avoid all attacks.

The damage caused by the first sequence of supreme rules was difficult to recover, and the injuries of the Divine Wing Blood Ants gradually worsened, and their combat effectiveness continued to decline.

"It's about to be killed!"

Ye Tian was excited.

Once this Divine Wing Blood Ant is killed, he can obtain the third Innate Primordial Treasure!

Soon.

The Divine Winged Blood Ant fell, turned into a corpse, and fell completely.

"Kill it!"

Immediately, Ye Tian took out an item from the void of its eyes.

It is an innate treasure in the shape of a clear lens, and it seems to blend into the eyes.

Ye Tian's other copy body left, and this copy body was here to study this innate original treasure.

He immediately refined this innate primordial treasure, integrated it into his eyes, and saw what the effect of this innate primordial treasure was.

I originally thought that this innate primordial treasure was very complicated, but I didn't expect to quickly understand the mystery.

This innate primordial treasure has two functions, the first role is to collect information to assist in battle, that is, the god-winged blood ants used this ability to fight with him before, so as to seize the opportunity again and again, and assist a lot in combat.

Even if you encounter a strong enemy, you can win the battle.

Without this ability, the Divine Winged Blood Ant would have been easily killed by him.

In fact, this role is not too big, the real effect is the second ability.

Identification!

This innate primordial treasure can identify all things.

Even if it was an item he had never seen before, this innate primordial treasure could be identified.

Immediately.

Ye Tian took out a piece of metal that he had never seen before and let this innate original treasure be identified.

Airplanes!

In a flash of light, the metal was identified.

Blood Dragon Stygian Gold, which can extract the Blood Dragon Stygian Liquid, combined with the Ancient Dragon Flower, can promote the transformation of the Mythical Body......

", this innate primordial treasure is terrifying, and it can even identify its specific effect!"

Ye Tian identified all the materials.

However, due to the limited amount of material on this replica body, it is not possible to identify much.

"When I get out, I'll take a look at all the resources I couldn't know how useful I used in the past. "

"I wonder if I can identify other innate primordial treasures?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

If it can be identified, then he doesn't need to slowly study the effect of a kind of innate primordial treasure, and directly identifies all of its effects, and it can be used immediately.

"It's a pity that the other two innate primordial treasures are outside, so we can only wait until they go out to identify them!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

"With this innate primordial treasure, my strength has increased greatly, and when I encounter the Nine Xuan Demon Venerable, I can easily suppress him! Even when I encounter an even more terrifying Demon Venerable, I can barely resist and even escape!"

At this time, Ye Tian's confidence soared.

Immediately, he left the place and continued to search for resources.

It would be great if we could find the Innate Primordial Treasure again!

......

Outside the Ancient Abyss.

The First Elder was still waiting anxiously, and he was urging a deduction-type innate primordial treasure in his hand, which was deducing the situation in the Ancient Abyss Realm.

Although it is impossible to know the details, it is still possible to calculate how many elders have fallen on your side.

"Seven elders have fallen, and it is said that ten have fallen to the Dao Realm!"

The First Patriarch also had some heartache.

In the past, the loss of one patriarch was a huge loss, but if seven patriarchs were lost, and all of them were veterans with great potential, such a loss would be difficult to make up for for a long time.

However, this must be done, otherwise once the Gu Yuan Fruit is obtained by the Demon Gu and the Demon Gu breaks through, the entire Innate Origin Domain Alliance will be destroyed, and all the elders may die in battle.

Thankfully, the Void Demon Side of the Supreme Dao has fallen twelve Demon Venerables, and there are even more Demon Lords who have fallen.

Comparatively speaking, the loss of the Void Demon side of the Supreme Dao is greater.

As for the loss of the Dao Void Demon side, some of the credit was attributed to Ye Tian's hands.

Time passes.

Ye Tian's harvest became more and more, and even the first sequence of Dao rule items found another one.

Of course, this first-order Dao Rule item is also low-quality.

......

Somewhere in the Ancient Abyss Realm.

A demon lord came to an area and unexpectedly saw a huge sacred tree, and on this sacred tree there was a fruit growing on it, which was full of dark aura and contained incomparably terrifying power.

"Gu Yuan Fruit!"

The demon lord was excited.

I didn't expect Gu Yuanguo to be the first to be found by him, what a huge credit!

After he goes out, he will inevitably get the attention of the First Demon Venerable, and he will be trained to become a top Demon Venerable.

Of course.

In his heart, he also had the idea of occupying the Gu Yuan Fruit, whether he would surpass the First Demon Venerable because of this.

But soon, he snuffed out that idea.

If he dared to occupy the Gu Yuan Fruit, there was a high probability that he would not be able to hide it from the First Demon Venerable, and he would be directly pinched to death by the First Demon Venerable.

"It's better to take this ancient abyss fruit and immediately go out and offer it to the First Demon Venerable!"

After this demon lord thought like this, he wanted to snatch this ancient abyss fruit.

However.

This Ancient Abyss Realm Tree has extremely powerful combat power, and when this Demon Lord approached, a branch of the Ancient Abyss Realm Technique turned into the most terrifying weapon of time, and it pierced through in an instant.

The demon lord was shocked and tried to resist, but the body of legend was pierced, and a terrifying force erupted within him, destroying his vitality.

Before he died, he spread the news.

Even if he dies, if he passes on the news, it will be a great contribution, and his descendants will be valued.

That's the only thing he can do!

Soon.

A Demon Venerable got the news and immediately rushed here.

At this time.

The first elder deduced that something was wrong, and then deduced it with all his might, only to find that the Ancient Abyss Realm Tree had been found by the Void Demon side of the Dao.

Immediately.

He used a special method to summon a patriarch of the Ancient Abyss Realm, asking them to follow the other Demon Venerables and find the Ancient Abyss Realm Tree.

......

Ancient Abyss Realm.

"Has the Dao Void Demon found the Ancient Abyss Realm Tree?"

Ye Tian also got the news, and immediately his six copy bodies didn't look for resources, they went all out to find the trace of the Demon Venerable, and if they found one, they secretly followed, and they could find the Ancient Abyss Realm Tree.
